login.title: Sign in to Stikup
login.subtitle: Welcome back — pick your method below.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Free to join — your first 3 stickers are on us.
register.error_conflict: An account with that email already exists.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent_message: If an account with that email exists, we'll send a reset link. Check your inbox.

login_failed.title: Sign-in failed
login_failed.body: We couldn't complete the sign-in. This can happen if you denied access or the link expired.

hero.description: One selfie. Twelve cartoon stickers. Yours forever — installed straight into Telegram by our bot. No artists. No prompts.

how_it_works.title: Three steps.
how_it_works.description: The whole flow is built for one-handed mobile use — because that's where Telegram lives.

steps.step_01_body: Open @stikup_bot and tap /start. We send you a one-tap link straight into the app — no passwords.
steps.step_02_body: Front-facing photo, good light, one face. We check it instantly and tell you if anything looks off.
steps.step_03_body: Your full pack of 12 generates upfront. Take the 3 free — refer a friend who signs up to unlock all 12 free, or pay $5 to unlock and get 10 more generations.

pack_showcase.title: Here's what you actually get.
pack_showcase.description: Every pack is 12 stickers, generated from one photo. You see all 12 right away — 3 are free to take, 9 stay locked until you unlock the pack.

bullets.b2: Real Telegram sticker set you own
bullets.b4: Unlock all 12 for $5 — or free when a friend signs up

items.ready_body: Synchronous flow. Watch your pack come to life while you wait.
items.likeness_body: Tight prompts + a forgiving cartoon style so people actually recognise you.
items.telegram_body: Created under your Telegram account. Yours forever. Install with one tap.
items.download_body: Grab the WebPs or PNGs and use them anywhere — TikTok, IG, Discord, you name it.

pricing.title: One pack. One price.
pricing.description: Try the 3-sticker preview free. Pay once to unlock all 12 — or refer a friend who signs up to unlock free.
pricing.regional_pricing: Regional pricing — pay in your own currency.
pricing.payment_methods: Stripe · Apple Pay · Google Pay · CIS, EU, US currency support
pricing.referral_note: No budget? Refer a friend who registers and all 12 unlock free.

bullets.b2: Real Telegram sticker set you own
bullets.b5: Bot delivers it for you in seconds
bullets.b6: No watermark. No subscription. No catch.

items.a1: You message our Telegram bot. It opens a webpage where you upload one selfie. About 1–3 minutes later, you see all 12 stickers — 3 are free to take, and the other 9 are visibly locked. Refer a friend who signs up to unlock the whole pack free, or pay $5 — the bot installs it to your Telegram.
items.a2: All 12 stickers unlock instantly — no second wait. The bot creates a real Telegram sticker set you own and DMs you the install link. You also get 10 more generations to make new packs or re-roll.
items.q3: Can I make more than one pack?
items.a3: Yes — each pack is a separate purchase. A $5 unlock includes 10 more generations, so you can run new packs without paying again. Referrals also unlock free. No subscription, no surprise charges.
items.a4: Stored only while your account exists. Delete your account from settings — the photo, the pack, the generated files all cascade out. GDPR-ready from day one.
items.q5: Why are 9 stickers locked instead of just hidden?
items.a5: So you can see exactly what you'd be unlocking. The locked previews are the real generated stickers — visible, with a small lock badge on top. Paying flips the badge off and installs all 12 to your Telegram, no second AI call.

final_cta.description: One selfie. We do the rest. Sticker pack waiting in your Telegram.

pack_list.make_another_body: Different photo, fresh 12 stickers. Your $5 unlock includes 10 generations.

empty_state.title: No sticker packs yet
empty_state.body: You haven't made a sticker pack yet. Drop a selfie to begin.

account_row.delete_body: Cascading delete — your packs, stickers, and uploaded photo all removed. GDPR-compliant.

intro.title: Drop in one photo.
intro.description: Front-facing, well-lit, one face in frame. We'll handle the rest.

drop_zone.title: Drop a selfie or tap to pick
drop_zone.formats: JPEG · PNG · HEIC · up to 10 MB

tips.free_preview_body: Your full pack of 12 generates upfront. After you see it, take the 3 free, unlock all 12 ($5 — includes 10 more generations), or refer a friend to unlock free.
tips.privacy_note: We never share or sell your photo. It's stored only while your account exists and removed instantly when you delete it.

error.invalid_format: Use a JPEG, PNG, or HEIC photo.
error.too_large: File is over 10 MB. Try a smaller export.

header.title: Your sticker pack is alive.
header.description: All 12 generated. 3 free, 9 unlock with the pack.

success.share_tiktok_body: Drop a sticker into a video and tag #stikup. Your pack travels.
success.invite_body: When they register, all 12 of your stickers unlock — free.
success.make_another_body: Different photo, fresh 12 stickers. Your $5 unlock includes 10 generations — no subscription.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.disclaimer: This policy is a plain-language template provided for transparency. It is not legal advice — please have it reviewed by a qualified professional before relying on it.
privacy.intro: Stikup turns your photos into sticker packs. This policy explains what information we collect when you use the app, how we use it, and the choices you have. By using Stikup you agree to the practices described here.
privacy.collect_body: We collect the account details you provide when you sign up (such as your email address and, if you connect them, your Telegram or Google identity), the photos you upload to generate stickers, and the sticker packs we create for you. We also record basic usage data such as how many generations you have used.
privacy.use_body: We use your information to create your stickers, deliver packs to you over download or Telegram, maintain your account and generation balance, prevent abuse, and respond to support requests. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.ai_body: Photos you upload are processed to generate your sticker pack. We keep them only as long as needed to produce and deliver your stickers, and use them for no other purpose. We do not use your photos to advertise to you.
privacy.third_party_body: When you link Telegram or sign in with Google, those providers share basic profile details (such as your name and avatar) so we can identify your account and deliver stickers. Their handling of your data is governed by their own privacy policies.
privacy.retention_body: We keep your account data while your account is active. You can delete your account at any time from Settings, which removes your packs and associated personal data, except where we are required to retain limited records by law.
privacy.rights_body: You can access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. To make a request, or if you have questions about your privacy, contact us using the details below and we will respond within a reasonable time.
privacy.contact_body: Questions about this policy or your data? Email us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.disclaimer_note: These terms are a plain-language template provided for transparency. They are not legal advice — please have them reviewed by a qualified professional before relying on them.
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of Stikup. By creating an account or using the app, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use Stikup.
terms.use_body: You must be old enough to form a binding contract in your country to use Stikup. You are responsible for activity on your account and for keeping your login details secure. We may update or discontinue features over time.
terms.content_body: You keep ownership of the photos you upload and the stickers we generate for you. You confirm you have the right to upload each photo. You grant us a limited licence to process your photos solely to create and deliver your sticker packs.
terms.acceptable_body: Do not upload content that is illegal, infringes others' rights, or depicts someone without their consent, and do not misuse, overload, or attempt to reverse-engineer the service. We may suspend or remove accounts that break these rules.
terms.payments_body: Stikup offers a limited number of free generations and ways to unlock more, such as referrals. Once you claim a pack by downloading it or sending it to Telegram, the remaining generations for that allowance are used up. Promotional terms may change.
terms.disclaimer_body: Stikup is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that generated stickers will meet your expectations or that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free.
terms.liability_body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Stikup and its team are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.changes_body: We may update these terms from time to time. If we make material changes, we will update the date above. Continued use of Stikup after changes take effect means you accept the revised terms.
terms.contact_body: Questions about these terms? Email us at

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need a hand? We're happy to help with anything related to your account, your sticker packs, or how Stikup works. The fastest way to reach us is by email.
support.response_time: We aim to respond within one business day.
support.account_body: trouble logging in, linking Telegram or Google, or deleting your account.
support.stickers_body: issues generating a pack, downloading stickers, or receiving them in Telegram.
support.billing_body: questions about your generation balance, referrals, or unlocking the full pack.
support.include_body: When you write in, include the email on your account and, if relevant, the pack link or a short description of what happened. Screenshots are always welcome.

subscribe.title: Subscriptions are on the way
subscribe.body: Subscriptions aren't available just yet. We're putting the finishing touches on flexible plans so you can keep making packs without limits.
subscribe.note: We'll let you know the moment they go live.

telegram_app.error_body: Something went wrong with your Telegram session. You can retry or sign in with email.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.body: We hit an unexpected hiccup while rendering this page. You can try again — if it keeps happening, please come back in a minute.
